memoryArtifacts.headline: Family of Herbert from Annals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777
memoryArtifacts.description: Family of Herbert from Annuals and Antiquities, vol. II, pg. 776-777. However, it is noted, that Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) was not the Count of Vermandois, but rather his uncle was, Herbert IV, Count of Vermandois. It is also noted that the son of Herbertus Camerarius, Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer) is missing from the Annals and Antiquities, but his grandson Herbert (Herbert FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert  (Herbert FitzHerbert) are included.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159
memoryArtifacts.description: Pedigree of the family of Herbert of Vermandois (Herbertus Camerarius) in Collections Historical & Archaeological Relating to Montgomeryshire, Vol. V, pages 158-159

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer)
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius), in A Genealogical and Heraldic History of the Landed Gentry of Great Britain and Ireland, Vol. 1, pg. 613 [but missing the generation of Henry the Treasurer). The record skips to the son of Henry, Herbert FitzHenry (Herbert FitzHerbert I, and his son Herbert FitzHerbert (II).

memoryArtifacts.headline: Peter FitzReginald in A Genealogical and Heraldic Dictionary of the Landed Gentry of Great Britian and Ireland, pg. 659
memoryArtifacts.description: Peter FitzReginald in A Genealogical and Heraldic Dictionary of the Landed Gentry of Great Britian and Ireland, pg. 659

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert FitzPeter in A Genealogical History of the Dormant, Abeyant, Forfeited, and Extinct Peerages of the British Empire, pg. 271

memoryArtifacts.headline: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius) in History of Monmouthshire, pgs. 116-118 [but missing the generation of Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer)]
memoryArtifacts.description: Herbert the Chamberlain (Herbertus Camerarius) in History of Monmouthshire, pgs. 116-118 [but missing the generation of Henry FitzHerbert (Henry the Treasurer)] skipping to Grandson Herbert FitzHerbert (FitzHenry) and great grandson Herbert FitzHerbert.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan於1335年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾時，她的父親Hywel Fychan ap Hywel22歲，母親Gwerful verch Ieuan32歲。她與Gwilym ap Jenkin結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1440年在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾培希爾享年105歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan于1335年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾时，她的父亲Hywel Fychan ap Hywel22岁，母亲Gwerful verch Ieuan32岁。她与Gwilym ap Jenkin结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1440年在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾培希爾享年105岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan was born in 1335, in Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, was 22 and her mother, Gwerful verch Ieuan, was 32. She married Gwilym ap Jenkin. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1440, in Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 105.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan est née en 1335, à Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gwerful verch Ieuan, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Gwilym ap Jenkin. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1440, à Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 105 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan 1335 in Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hywel Fychan ap Hywel 22 und ihre Mutter Gwerful verch Ieuan 32. Sie hat Gwilym ap Jenkin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1440 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan è nata il nel 1335 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Gwerful verch Ieuan, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Gwilym ap Jenkin. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1440, nel Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 105 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychanが1335年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hywel Fychan ap Hywelは22歳，母Gwerful verch Ieuanは32歳であった。Gwilym ap Jenkinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1440年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアペルスイルで105歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan(이)가 1335년 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel Fychan ap Hywel(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwerful verch Ieuan(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Gwilym ap Jenkin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1440년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 퍼스이르에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan родилась в 1335 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Hywel Fychan ap Hywel было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gwerful verch Ieuan, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gwilym ap Jenkin. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1440 г. в местности пиртир, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 105 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Hywel Fychan nació en 1335, en Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Hywel Fychan ap Hywel, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gwerful verch Ieuan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Gwilym ap Jenkin. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1440, en Perthyr, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 105 años.
